summary: Iteration 95: All requested features tested and verified. Product variant selection working correctly with 'Options Available' badge and selectable options in modal. All 14 pillars have products and services. Pet Score (Pawmoter) displays in navbar after login. NPS/Net Pawmoter Score section shows testimonials in product detail modal. Admin and member login working. Ticket endpoints functional.

admin_login.details: POST /api/admin/login with username=aditya, password=lola4304 returns success and token

member_login.details: POST /api/auth/login with dipali@clubconcierge.in/test123 returns access_token and user data

tickets_list.details: GET /api/tickets returns list of tickets with proper structure

single_ticket.details: GET /api/tickets/{ticket_id} returns ticket with all fields

product_variants.details: Products with options (e.g., Pick-A-Treat Pup Box) have proper options array with values and variants array with prices

product_options_ui.details: Shop page shows 'Options Available' badge on products. Clicking product opens modal with selectable options (Choice Of Grain Free Treat, Choice of Biscuit Treat, Choice of Toy)

all_14_pillars_products.details: All 14 pillars have products: celebrate(245), stay(80), travel(75), feed(21), care(75), fit(83), learn(65), enjoy(58), groom(10), adopt(24), farewell(28), dine(56), insure(9), shop(229)

pet_score_navbar.details: After login, Pet Score shows in navbar as 'Mojo 🐾 100%' next to Account

pet_score_api.details: GET /api/pet-score/{pet_id}/score_state returns score (18.4%), tier (Newcomer), categories, and recommendations

nps_testimonials_api.details: GET /api/concierge/nps/testimonials returns testimonials with score, feedback, member_name, pet_name

nps_section_in_modal.details: Product detail modal (on Celebrate page) shows 'Net Pawmoter Score™' section with score (10/100) and testimonials from Kavita Reddy, Rahul Verma, Priya Sharma

critical_code_review_comments: NPS section is only visible in ProductCard modal (used in pillar pages like /celebrate), not in ProductDetailPage (/product/:slug). Consider adding NPS section to ProductDetailPage for consistency.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 95 verified all requested features: 1) Product variant selection working - 'Options Available' badge shows on products, clicking opens modal with selectable options (size/flavor/toy), 2) All 14 pillars have products and services, 3) Pet Score (Pawmoter) shows in navbar after login (e.g., 'Mojo 🐾 100%'), 4) NPS/Net Pawmoter Score section in product modal shows testimonials with scores, 5) Admin login at /api/admin/login works, 6) Ticket endpoints working. Note: NPS section only appears in ProductCard modal (pillar pages), not in ProductDetailPage (/product/:slug).

product_variant_selection.details: Products with options show 'Options Available' badge. Modal displays selectable options like 'Choice Of Grain Free Treat' with buttons for Chicken, Chicken Liver, Pumpkin, Banana, Coconut

all_14_pillars_data.details: All pillars have products: celebrate(245), stay(80), travel(75), feed(21), care(75), fit(83), learn(65), enjoy(58), groom(10), adopt(24), farewell(28), dine(56), insure(9), shop(229)

pet_score_navbar.details: Shows 'Mojo 🐾 100%' in navbar after login, next to Account dropdown

nps_testimonials.details: Net Pawmoter Score™ section shows in product modal with score (10/100) and testimonials

admin_login.details: POST /api/admin/login with aditya/lola4304 returns success and JWT token

ticket_endpoints.details: GET /api/tickets and GET /api/tickets/{ticket_id} return proper data

mocked_apis.email_notifications: Resend email sending requires RESEND_API_KEY - currently logs only
